headline: 3 Consumer Stocks with Warning Signs
summary: Regarded as defensive investments, consumer staples stocks are generally safe bets in choppy markets. The flip side is that they frequently fall behind growth industries when times are good, and this was the reality over the past six months as the sector’s flat performance trailed the S&P 500’s 7.7% gain.
